title: RegionPlus
description: A lightweight WorldGuard addon that provides advanced placeholders and region tracking functionality
body:
# 🌍 RegionPlus – Dynamic Region Integration for WorldGuard

**RegionPlus** is an **open-source plugin** that turns **WorldGuard regions** into fully interactive systems. It provides powerful **placeholders, live updates, and event-driven integrations** — letting you connect regions with scoreboards, chats, GUIs, and more.

🔗 **GitHub:** [github.com/AkaTriggered/RegionPlus](https://github.com/AkaTriggered/RegionPlus)
🧠 **License:** Open Source (MIT) – Free to use, modify, and contribute


## 💡 Why RegionPlus?

WorldGuard protects your worlds — **RegionPlus makes them smart.**
With real-time region tracking, 20+ placeholders, and optimized event handling, RegionPlus lets you:

* Show live region info in scoreboards
* Make chats location-aware
* Track player counts per region
* Use region data in any PlaceholderAPI-supported plugin


## ⚙️ Tech Specs

* **Dependencies:** WorldGuard 7.0+, PlaceholderAPI 2.11+ (soft)
* **Java:** 17+
* **Server:** Paper/Spigot 1.16+
* **Performance:** Lightweight, zero database, under 0.5% tick usage


## 🚀 Highlights

* 🔹 Real-time region tracking (async optimized)
* 🔹 20+ placeholders for advanced integrations
* 🔹 Region-aware chat and scoreboard systems
* 🔹 Thread-safe caching with ConcurrentHashMap
* 🔹 No external database, pure memory performance


## 🔮 Roadmap

* Region analytics & insights
* Custom region triggers
* Region grouping & multi-world optimizations
* Public API for third-party integrations

**RegionPlus** — Built by the community, for the community.
Empower your regions. Keep your server dynamic.
